name: file-drop
title: File Drop
author: Parable
description: A demo drag-and-drop dropzone (no real upload) that highlights and lifts its icon on drag-over, accepts drop or click/keyboard browse via a real hidden file input, then lists chosen files as chips with a type icon, size, a fake ease-out progress bar, and a remove button; oversize files are rejected with a shake. Under prefers-reduced-motion it drops the scale, shake, and shimmer and jumps progress straight to done.
